name: Pizza Stew
recipeIngredient: 6 tbsp Black olives, pitted and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry Canadian bacon; drain and cut away any fat.
2. Heat tomato sauce and water to a boil.
3. Add bacon, vegetables, and seasonings.
4. Cook until vegetables are tender.
5. Add macaroni and reheat the soup to serve.
Makes 2 1/2 cups of soup.
